executives.name: David Rae
executives.background: Mr. Rae was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer in May 2020. He joined DPM in 2012 as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer. Prior to joining DPM, he was Vice President, Operations at Falconbridge and Xstrata Nickel.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Navin Dyal
executives.background: Mr. Dyal was appointed Chief Financial Officer in 2022. He has over 20 years of experience in finance and mining, previously serving as CFO of Teranga Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Michael Dorfman
executives.background: Mr. Dorfman is the Senior Vice President, Corporate Development. He has extensive experience in investment banking and corporate development within the mining sector.

board_of_directors.name: Jonathan Goodman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Goodman is the Executive Chair of the Board. He has over 30 years of experience in the resource and investment sectors. He is also the President and CEO of Dundee Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: R. Peter Gillin
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gillin is a corporate director and has served on several boards in the mining and financial sectors. He was previously Chairman and CEO of Tahera Diamond Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Marie-Anne Tawil
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Tawil is a lawyer and strategic consultant with over 30 years of experience. She has served on various boards including Hydro-Québec.

board_of_directors.name: Anthony P. Walsh
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Walsh is a Chartered Professional Accountant with extensive experience in the mining industry, including serving as President and CEO of Miramar Mining Corporation.
